tasks.name: Finalize zoning entitlements
tasks.notes: Planning staff confirmed no additional neighborhood review is required.

tasks.name: Complete architectural construction documents
tasks.notes: Structural sheets are coordinated; final MEP comments are in progress.

tasks.name: City permit review and comments
tasks.notes: Reviewer requested utility easement clarifications before approval.

tasks.name: Site clearing and abatement
tasks.notes: Hazardous material closeout packet is expected this week.

tasks.name: Utility relocation and temporary power
tasks.notes: Crew availability is constrained by the pending permit response.

tasks.name: Foundation excavation and pier drilling
tasks.notes: Drilling rig is reserved, but standby charges begin if access slips.

tasks.name: Structural steel procurement
tasks.notes: Mill order is locked; shop drawings are tracking to planned release.

tasks.name: Podium framing
tasks.notes: Sequencing depends on foundation access and steel delivery.

tasks.name: MEP rough-in
tasks.notes: Long-lead switchgear is tracking to the procurement plan.

tasks.name: Fire marshal rough inspection
tasks.notes: Inspection slot should be reserved after MEP rough-in reaches 80%.

tasks.name: Tenant interior buildout
tasks.notes: Mockup review is complete; finish procurement remains active.

tasks.name: Final inspection and certificate of occupancy
tasks.notes: Certificate package will require all trade closeout letters.

tasks.name: Historic facade review
tasks.notes: Facade mockups were accepted with minor storefront revisions.

tasks.name: Asbestos abatement
tasks.notes: Additional pipe wrap was discovered in the east stairwell.

tasks.name: Structural retrofit package
tasks.notes: Steel embeds are procured and ready for release after abatement clearance.

tasks.name: Window restoration and waterproofing
tasks.notes: Custom sash profiles added three weeks to fabrication.

tasks.name: Unit framing and corridor layout
tasks.notes: Field layout is ready; access will depend on abatement clearance.

tasks.name: Elevator modernization
tasks.notes: Controller shipment is tracking to the planned install window.

tasks.name: Mass grading and pad certification
tasks.notes: Pad B has passed compaction; Pad C certification is scheduled.

tasks.name: Stormwater basin and drainage tie-ins
tasks.notes: County requested revised calculations after the basin depth change.

tasks.name: Warehouse slab placement
tasks.notes: Concrete supplier has reserved the first placement window.

tasks.name: Tilt-up panel casting and erection
tasks.notes: Panel shop drawings are approved.

tasks.name: Dock equipment procurement
tasks.notes: Leveler lead times moved after supplier allocation changes.

tasks.name: Tenant power distribution
tasks.notes: Transformer pad is ready; switchboard submittal is under review.
